message:
feat: add queueing-theoretic admission control module (RGC-611B)

M/D/c-based worker pool sizing, token-bucket admission, per-stage queue
partitioning, priority-aware shedding, and content-addressed audit receipts.
47 unit tests, all passing. Also fixes compile errors in
counterfactual_intervention_planner.rs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
